title: The Promise to Grow Stronger
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #14, Dadan, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #15 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #14, Dadan, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: East Blue: Goa kingdom, Fuschia Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey. Good to see everyone's all right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Garp-San has returned in a battleship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ahhh!! That's so reassuring, all right!!

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Stay back, men! I know this woman...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They were right in front of you....!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #14, Dadan, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger.
